summary: Solid PowerShell/YAML deliverable with strong conventions. Module (LicenseChecker.psm1) properly separates concerns; CLI wrapper (Invoke-LicenseCheck.ps1) has clear error handling and exit codes; workflow uses pinned actions (v4), minimal permissions (contents:read), proper job dependencies (check needs test), and shell:pwsh. Test harness comprehensively validates via act with exact output assertions. Minor issues: child pwsh invocation in workflow (line ~81) is unconventional though well-documented; log parsing (lines 277-281) lacks inline comments explaining act output format stripping; Pester test file content not provided (per eval rules, excluded). No dead code, proper -LiteralPath usage, type hints throughout. Reasonably confident in runtime validation, though `actionlint` and `act` execution cannot be verified. Ship-worthy.
